prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large green metal cube
  - obj_1: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_2: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: large gray metal cube
  - obj_5: small green rubber cube
  - obj_6: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_7: large green rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: large gray rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0121] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0122] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0123] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0124] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0125] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0126] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0127] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0128] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0129] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0130] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0131] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0132] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0133] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0134] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0135] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0136] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0137] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0138] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0139] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0140] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene to answer distance comparison questions.

Let me identify the approximate positions of each object:
- obj_0 (large green metal cube): right side, front area
- obj_1 (large blue metal cylinder): left-center, front
- obj_2 (large cyan rubber cylinder): left-center, back
- obj_3 (large red rubber cylinder): center-right, middle
- obj_4 (large gray metal cube): center-back
- obj_5 (small green rubber cube): left, front-middle
- obj_6 (large yellow metal cube): center-front
- obj_7 (large green rubber cylinder): right-center, front
- obj_8 (large gray rubber cube): right-back

Wait, looking at the image more carefully - these are described as "large" and "small" objects but the scene shows small objects. Let me re-examine.

Looking at the image, I can see the objects are all small/medium sized. Let me estimate positions:
- obj_0 (green metal cube): far right
- obj_1 (blue metal cylinder): left-center, front
- obj_2 (cyan rubber cylinder): left-back area
- obj_3 (red rubber cylinder): center-right, middle
- obj_4 (gray metal cube): center-back
- obj_5 (small green rubber cube): far left, middle
- obj_6 (yellow metal cube): center-front
- obj_7 (green rubber cylinder): right-center, front
- obj_8 (gray rubber cube): right-back

Distance obj_0 to obj_7: both on right side, close together ~2-3 units
